name: Fire Bolt
description: Hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object. Ranged spell attack; on a hit, 1d10 fire damage. Damage scales at 5th, 11th, and 17th level.

name: Mage Hand
description: A spectral hand you can use to manipulate objects, open doors, or carry up to 10 pounds.

name: Magic Missile
description: Three glowing darts, each dealing 1d4+1 force damage and hitting automatically. Creates one more dart per slot level above 1st.

name: Shield
description: An invisible barrier grants +5 AC until the start of your next turn, including against the triggering attack, and negates magic missile.

name: Burning Hands
description: A cone of flame; each creature in it makes a Dexterity save, taking 3d6 fire damage (half on success). +1d6 per slot level above 1st.

name: Detect Magic
description: Sense the presence of magic within 30 feet, and learn the school of any magical aura you see.
